name: Spanish Arms
preceding_figure_names: Change of Places Left to Right, Rolling Off the Arm, Spanish Arms, Windmill
following_figure_names: Link (release R to L hand hold as needed), Change of Places Left to Right (release R to L hand hold as needed), Change of Hands Behind Back (release R to L hand hold as needed), Hip Bump (release R to L hand hold as needed), American Spin (left to right hand hold), Stop and Go (release R to L hand hold as needed), Windmill (release R to L hand hold as needed), Spanish Arms (release R to L hand hold as needed), Rolling Off the Arm (with double hold or releasing L to R hand hold), Toe Heel Swivels (release R to L hand hold as needed)
notes:
Spin Ending to Spanish Arms:
Man: towards end of step 5, give a stronger pull with R hand, then immediately release R to L hand hold on steps 6-8 Compact chasse RLR, making no turn, continue to turn Lady to R under raised L arm and lower arm at end of Lady's turn. End in Open Position.
Lady: Spin approx. a complete turn to R on RF underarm towards end of step 5. Steps 6-8 LF side and slightly back to chasse LRL, turning 1/2 to L to end LF back in Open Position.

steps.action: Forward small step to start movement
comments: Begin in Open Position, double hand hold

steps.action: Chasse LRL to Tandem Position, Lady in front slightly to right
comments: Raise L hand and circle it counterclockwise
R hand at Lady's waist level

steps.action: Forward chasse RLR to Open Position
comments: Towards end of step 5 give light pull with R hand

steps.action: Turn underarm to R on RF
steps.amount_of_turn: 1/4 to L over steps 3-5, then 1/2 to R on RF
comments: In Tandem Position on step 5, L arm across front of body at waist level

steps.action: Chasse LRL back to Open Position
comments: F sdiag. back to chase LRL, end LF back in Open Position
Spin approx. a complete turn to R on RF underarm (Lady)
Man gives stronger pull then releases to L hand hold
